---
title: "11. з—ӣз—№еҺҘйҖҶдёҺдёҙз•Ңз—ҮеҖҷ"
subtitle: "Pain, Bi, Jue, and Critical Syndromes"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 11
categories: [huangdi-neijing, cultural, omega]
description: "How pain, bi, jue, reversal, and edge syndromes reveal threshold behavior, loss of recoverability, and shared stabilization failures."
---

**Chapters:** зҙ й—®37-45, зҒөжһў21-24, зҒөжһў27, зҒөжһў35, зҒөжһў53, зҒөжһў70, зҒөжһў81  
**Omega Directions:** `fold operator`, `fiber structure`, `rate-distortion information theory`

{{< include articles/category_11_pain_bi_jue_critical_syndromes.md >}}

---

[Back to Huangdi Neijing Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
